rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §37.082 governs student use of personal communication devices on school property. The two provisions address unrelated subjects with no operational intersection.
quote: Sec. 37.082. STUDENT USE OF PERSONAL COMMUNICATION DEVICES.
_note: No conflict; the rule text addresses an unrelated subject (student communication device policy) and contains no reference to property tax, homestead exemptions, or school funding mechanics.
